CV

title: About
text: I am an incoming freshman in the Biological Science program in the [Florida States University](https://www.fsu.edu//). I love doing research and enjoy exploring new things in the lab and anything related to Biology and medicine. I hope I will help discover new innovative ideas to help others. Look forward to going to the Sunshine State very soon! Go Seminoles!
